calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-08-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-23-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Charles Drexler, via Zoom, for Anne L. Easterwood, Petitioner.

The court notes that counsel's practice is located in Alameda County and that his client seems to reside in the same county and asks why he didn't file the instant petition in that county. Counsel advises that he filed the petition in San Francisco pursuant to probate code and offers advocacy that venue is proper. The court notes concern that the predeceased spouse was not mentioned until the fifth (5th) supplement. Counsel clarifies the delay in mentioning the preceding and confirms that an Heir search company was hired to research Decedent's genealogy. The court advises that it finds that venue is proper pursuant to counsel's testimony.

The subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
